---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What are you trying to do that the appliance makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution
What would you like it to do instead?

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you weighed, and why they fall short.

## Additional context
Anything else — related services, screenshots, links. Note if you'd be willing to
implement it (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
